title: Villages & Vindicators
description: A Vanilla++ modpack aimed with making survival gameplay more interesting with added RPG aspects, while still retaining the feeling of classic minecraft.
body:
A Vanilla++ modpack aimed with making survival gameplay more interesting with added RPG aspects, while still retaining the feeling of classic minecraft.

Enhances combat and exploration with mods such as 'Better Combat', 'Enhanced AI', 'When Dungeons Arise', 'Dave's Potioneering', etc

Also includes a fully custom and tested skill tree for several categories. Skyrim Inspired.

We recommend playing in HARD difficulty with the default healthregen turned off for the best experience. Don't worry, we also made sure the player can get pretty strong too!
